title: Stone drops
body:
# Stone drops
The datapack adds minerals that drop from stone.
The datapack blocks the possibility of extracting ores from ore blocks.
If you encounter any problems, please contact me.
![stone drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eu7r0JCA/images/3b00bed1cc03717707061ab7df64121c950f6ae3.png)
![stone drops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eu7r0JCA/images/9619c0eae041827628ba452de00cdeadc60519de.png)
